data.title: Aesthetic-Usability Effect
data.description: A design that looks nice is often perceived to be more usable.
data.technical_spec: Highly responsive layout with visual consistency across devices.

data.title: Fitts's Law
data.description: Ease of use is proportional to the target size and distance.
data.technical_spec: Large, easily clickable or tappable buttons/icons for user interaction.

data.title: Hick’s Law
data.description: The time taken to make a decision increases with the number of choices.
data.technical_spec: Curated content and personalized recommendations to guide user decisions.

data.title: Miller’s Law
data.description: Limits the user's cognitive load by not overloading with information.
data.technical_spec: Focused content sections and minimalistic interface design.

data.title: Jakob’s Law
data.description: Users prefer your site to work the same way as all the other sites they use.
data.technical_spec: Utilizes familiar interaction patterns and control schemes.
